summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enhanced Profile Page for The Drop. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend profile page fully functional with all stats dashboard elements, settings, and interactive features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: button cannot contain nested button (NewsCard > WhyThisStory) - causes hydration error warning

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/profile/stats returns all required fields (knowledge_score, streak, stories_read, reactions, favourite_category, countries_covered, member_since)
Backend: GET /api/profile/stats correctly calculates knowledge score formula: (stories_read * 1) + (streak * 2) + (reactions * 0.5) + (days_active_this_month * 3)
Backend: GET /api/profile/stats stores knowledge_score in knowledge_score_log collection
Backend: GET /api/profile/stats returns correct rank labels (Curious/Informed/Switched On/Sharp/No Cap Legend)
Backend: GET /api/profile/stats requires authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Backend: POST /api/streak/read increments stories_read_count and adds to days_active
Backend: POST /api/streak/read is idempotent same day
Backend: POST /api/articles/{id}/react adds reaction and increments reactions_given_count
Backend: POST /api/articles/{id}/react toggles off existing reaction
Backend: POST /api/articles/{id}/react rejects invalid reaction types
Backend: POST /api/articles/{id}/react accepts all valid reactions (mind_blown, surprising, angry, sad, inspiring)
Backend: GET /api/countries returns list with country_code, country_name, flag_emoji
Frontend: Profile page loads with data-testid='profile-page'
Frontend: Avatar image shows DiceBear URL with data-testid='profile-avatar'
Frontend: Username displayed with @ prefix (@hansel)
Frontend: Age badge shows 'DROP REGULAR' for 14-16 age group with data-testid='age-badge'
Frontend: Knowledge score card displays score number and rank label
Frontend: Streak card shows flame icon with current (1) and best streak (1)
Frontend: Stories read card shows total and weekly/monthly breakdown
Frontend: Reactions card shows most used emoji and total count
Frontend: Favourite topic card shows top category (World)
Frontend: Countries covered card shows count (3) in feed this week
Frontend: Country selector opens dropdown with 20 countries
Frontend: Country selector successfully changes country (tested with India)
Frontend: Edit city button opens input field
Frontend: Save city button successfully saves new city
Frontend: Logout button works and redirects to auth page
Frontend: Notification settings section visible with toggles
action_items: Minor: Fix button nesting issue in FeedPage (NewsCard contains WhyThisStory button nested inside button)
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning in FeedPage: 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>' - WhyThisStory button is nested inside NewsCard button element

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all profile page elements and interactions working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user 'hansel'. Created 1 streak entry, 1 reaction during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile page fully implemented with 3 sections: Identity Header (avatar, name, @username, country flag, member since, age badge), Stats Dashboard (knowledge score card with rank, streak with flame, stories read, favourite topic, reactions, countries covered), and Settings (country selector with 20 countries, city editor, notification settings, logout button). All data-testids present and working: profile-page, profile-avatar, age-badge, knowledge-score-card, knowledge-score-value, knowledge-rank-label, streak-card, streak-current, stories-read-card, stories-read-total, favourite-topic-card, reactions-card, reactions-total, countries-card, country-selector-btn, country-option-{code}, edit-city-btn, save-city-btn, edit-city-input, logout-btn, friends-section-placeholder. DiceBear adventurer avatars used.

features_verified.profile_stats_api: ✅ Returns all required fields with correct formula
features_verified.identity_header: ✅ Avatar, name, @username, country flag, member since, age badge
features_verified.stats_dashboard: ✅ Knowledge score, streak, stories read, reactions, favourite topic, countries
features_verified.country_selector: ✅ Opens dropdown, selects country, saves to backend
features_verified.logout: ✅ Clears session and redirects to auth
